_researchNotes: Bark.com new-lead alert (pre-purchase). Sender: lead alerts come from team@bark.com — Bark's own help article 'Add Bark to your email contact list' (help.bark.com, article 13177545578652) tells sellers to safelist exactly team@bark.com / the bark.com domain so lead emails reach the inbox; LiveAgent's Bark directory confirms 'Bark.com sends emails from team@bark.com to communicate about product releases, new customer leads and promotional offers.' Subject pattern '{FirstName} is looking for a {service}...' is quoted first-hand by a seller (iamryanwright.com/blog/bark-lead-generation-service: 'Emma is looking for a wedding photographer'). Body mirrors the on-platform lead card: customer first name + last initial, town/region, category, then the request-form Q&A (event type, date, guest count, duration, venue type, budget, free text), the upfront credit cost ('Respond to X for N credits' — help.bark.com Credits & Billing: cost in credits known upfront), and a link to the lead on bark.com/sellers/. Client phone/email are deliberately withheld until the seller pays credits (help.bark.com 'responding to leads': 'when you pay to respond to a lead you'll get the customer's phone number and email'). HTML is the primary part; a plain-text alternative is included.
subject: Maya is looking for a Wedding DJ near Austin, TX
textBody:
Hi Demo DJ Co,

You have a new lead on Bark!

Maya R.
Austin, TX

DJs

What type of event is it?
Wedding

When is the event?
Saturday, 14 November 2026

Approximately how many guests will attend?
100 - 149

How long do you need the DJ for?
5 hours

What type of venue is it?
Hotel / banquet hall

What is your budget?
$750 - $1,000

Anything else the DJ should know?
Ceremony on the lawn, reception in the ballroom. We love 90s R&B and Motown.

Respond to Maya for 12 credits.

View this lead: https://www.bark.com/sellers/leads/812345/

--
Bark.com Global Limited, 85 Great Portland Street, London, W1W 7LT
Don't want lead emails like this? Update your lead settings: https://www.bark.com/settings/notifications/
